---
title: "About"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/prerna-tyagi-/
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/prernaaa0808
toc: false
---

Prerna Tyagi — AI/ML engineer. I build product-grade AI/ML systems end-to-end: problem framing, model development, API contracts, deployment, monitoring, and experimentation.

This blog is the long-form companion to my work. Each post pairs an explanation with a from-scratch implementation in [ml-applied-depth](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/ml-applied-depth), plus an assignment notebook so a reader can build the same thing themselves before reading the worked version.

## Shipped

- **[Pragya Nursery](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/pragya-nursery-platform)** — ordering platform for my father's nursery in Greater Noida. Vercel website + Render API + Capacitor Android app + Paytm payments.

## Open-source

- [Credit Risk Studio](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/credit-risk-studio) — end-to-end ML pipeline case study
- [Portfolio Optimizer Lab](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/portfolio-optimizer-lab) — optimization for decision support
- [Treasury Forecast Lab](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/treasury-forecast-lab) — time-series forecasting workflow
- [Fraud Detection Monitor](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/fraud-detection-monitor) — production-style fraud API
- [Personalized Marketplace Search](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/fintech-github-showcase/tree/main/personalized-marketplace-search) — hybrid retrieval + reranking
